title: Yes Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Yes Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Yes Bank! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Gurgaon team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Yes Bank:
Yes Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yes Bank!
